announcement: Complimentary Shipping on Orders over ₹2000 | Personal Styling via WhatsApp

hero.headline: Threads of  Royalty
hero.tagline: "Where every warp and weft whispers tales of ancient Coimbatore, woven into silhouettes of contemporary majesty."

timeline.title: The Origin
timeline.subtitle: A Loom of Whispering Threads
timeline.desc: Our journey began with a single handloom in Coimbatore, driven by a passion to preserve the sacred art of Kanchivaram weaving and pure zari crafts.

timeline.title: Imperial Expansion
timeline.subtitle: Masters of the Craft
timeline.desc: Bridging traditional aesthetics with modern silhouettes, creating unstitched suit sets and bridal couture that echo through generations of South Indian heritage.

timeline.title: The Digital Atelier
timeline.subtitle: Heritage Meets Modernity
timeline.desc: Taking Coimbatore's finest silks to a global audience — every thread woven with the same love, now delivered to your doorstep anywhere in India.

values.title: Authenticity
values.desc: Every saree directly from master weavers in Coimbatore.

values.title: Sustainability
values.desc: Ethical crafts protecting ancient heritage looms.

values.title: Legacy
values.desc: Four decades of unbroken weaving tradition.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Transparent pricing, secure checkout, easy returns.

concierge.headline: Royal Atelier
concierge.subtitle: Personal Stylist & Concierge
concierge.desc: Experience individual draping sessions, color analytics, and bridal trousseau consultations with our master stylists.
